programs.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programs.desc: A couple's ready to slow things down and find their seaside sanctuary in Astoria, Oregon; despite the low beach house prices, one of them has a renovation wish list that keeps rising, and it may threaten to swell costs beyond their budget.

programs.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programs.desc: A Texas family explores the shores of North Padre Island searching for an affordable dream home; they navigate their set budget to find hidden real estate gems that accommodate their large family.

programs.title: Renovation Aloha
programs.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn put their all on the line as they attempt their priciest flip to date.

programs.title: Renovation Aloha
programs.desc: With rotting floors, rats, and roaming chickens, Kamohai and Tristyn make an offer on the worst house they've ever seen. The deal falls out of escrow and returns at a bargain price, and now, they must transform this total disaster into a dream home.

programs.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programs.desc: Deep in the French countryside, a local expert helps a mother and daughter duo hunt bargain properties in Carcassonne; mom's looking to start a new life in a beautiful home and the search includes medieval castles, antique fairs, and some fine cheese.

programs.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programs.desc: On the northwest coast of Spain, a relocation expert guides a young couple searching for a dream bargain home in Galicia; they're taking in all the local culture of the region as they enjoy the natural thermal spas and learn how to make cheese!
